decisions.title: Monorepo Directory Layout
decisions.chosen_option: apps/ + packages/ (all deployable units in apps/, shared code in packages/)
decisions.rationale: Simplest mental model: apps/ = things that deploy, packages/ = things that are imported. Consistent with Turborepo/Nx conventions.

decisions.title: Database Strategy
decisions.chosen_option: Schema-per-service (logical separation within single PostgreSQL instance)
decisions.rationale: Enforces boundaries via naming conventions while keeping a single DB plan. Natural path to full isolation if needed later.

decisions.title: Local Development Environment
decisions.rationale: Single docker-compose.yml with profiles allows selective startup: core (postgres+pgadmin), services (gateway+agent), gpu (Modal workers).

decisions.title: PgAdmin Deployment
decisions.chosen_option: Deploy to Render as private service (not publicly accessible)
decisions.rationale: Provides prod DB management without public exposure. Accessible via Render's internal network.

decisions.title: CI Strategy
decisions.chosen_option: One workflow per app (path-filtered, only runs when that app changes)
decisions.rationale: Fast CI for solo developer — only affected services rebuild on push. Reduces wait time.

decisions.title: OpenAPI Client Generation
decisions.chosen_option: Drop generated OpenAPI clients — use simple HTTP clients
decisions.rationale: Less complexity for solo developer. Generated clients add maintenance burden without proportional value at this scale.

decisions.title: Python Dependency Management
decisions.chosen_option: uv — use uv for dependency management
decisions.rationale: Already partially in use in the project. Fast resolver, pyproject.toml-native, supports editable installs for shared packages.

decisions.title: LLM Provider Strategy
decisions.chosen_option: vLLM only — no fallback, return 503 when unavailable
decisions.rationale: Simplest operational model. No silent fallback to external providers; explicit failure signals infrastructure issues clearly.

decisions.title: LLM Model Selection for vLLM
decisions.chosen_option: Llama 3.1 8B (Meta) — fast, compact, fits any GPU
decisions.rationale: Good balance of capability and resource efficiency. Runs on A100-40GB with room to spare, fast inference, strong general-purpose performance.
